candidate_pool.description: predeclared non-levered liquid primary ETF pool across equities, sectors, international/country, rates/credit/inflation, real assets/commodities/FX proxies; no performance-ranked selection

costs.implementation: daily turnover haircut: sum(abs(delta target weights))*bps/10000 subtracted from daily portfolio return

data_source.configured_access: paper/market-data access configured with credential values redacted
data_source.provider: qfa/Alpaca real daily ETF market data via AlpacaGateway

orthogonality.deferred_reason: No separate alpha-library equity curves recomputed because validator failed controls/random-window gates; control streams proxy AR-006/021, ETF TSMOM/carry, SPY and equal-weight exposures.

random_period_protocol.method: 4 named stress windows where in-sample plus deterministic pseudo-random windows of 126-756 trading sessions to total 50; qfa/Alpaca real bars only

timing_rule.frozen: AR-021 observed-session ToM: long equal-weight selected universe on first 4 and final 1 observed sessions of each calendar month; flat otherwise

universe_discovery.filters: history>=1000 bars, missing<=8%, median 1y dollar volume>=USD5m, last price>=USD5, then sleeve cap top 8 by liquidity only before scoring
limitations: Alpaca daily bars may be split/dividend adjustment dependent through provider defaults
ETF inception dates limit some newer/commodity/fx proxies

warnings: Selected-universe liquidity filter can introduce current-constituent survivorship bias.
Controls include unconditional equal-weight exposure that is not directly same holding frequency but tests beta dominance.
